FNV MATERIAL TEXTURE PROPERTY CONTRACT AUDIT

Questions:
1. Where does BSShaderPPLighting setup read NiTexturingProperty or texture-set data from geometry?
2. Which property flags and texture slots control diffuse/normal/glow/specular/envmap paths?
3. Can Psycho discover optional PBR textures from native material context without trusting 0x011F91E0 blindly?
4. Which texture binding path owns native SetTexture/SetSamplerState calls for safe restore?

Expected use:
Use this to prove a draw-time material texture discovery contract before adding roughness/metalness conventions.

======================================================================
MATERIAL/TEXTURE STRING SCAN
======================================================================
